name: Rob Menendez
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,035,064 for Rob Menendez in U.S. House, NJ-08. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,035,064.
